title: The Last Amityville Movie
overview: During the midst of a massive pandemic and lockdown, a Horror Youtube guy finds himself trapped in the very thing that he spends his time tearing down : a bad horror film. Alone and isolated, a mysterious package from somewhere in Long Island seems to be driving him mad. Can he use his knowledge of crappy horror films to stay alive, or will he be just another victim in the Last Amityville Movie?
